scripts.build: npm --workspace @pdf-intelligence/contracts run build && npm --workspace @pdf-intelligence/project-schema run build && npm --workspace @pdf-intelligence/desktop run build
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm --workspace @pdf-intelligence/desktop run test:e2e
scripts.test:package: npm run package:dir && npm --workspace @pdf-intelligence/desktop run test:package
scripts.check: npm test && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:package && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
